content:
~ A Beautiful Coincidence in India's Calendar.... 🇮🇳

~ 1st July is one of the few dates that celebrates two professions working silently behind the nation's strength....

~ Doctor's Day is observed in honour of Dr. B. C. Roy..., whose birth and death both fell on this day....!

~ CA Day marks the establishment of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) on 1st July 1949....! 

~ One safeguards the nation's health....
~ The other safeguards its financial health....

~ One heals the heartbeat....
~ The other protects the balance sheet....

~ One saves lives.....
~ The other sustains livelihoods.....

- Different responsibilities....
- Different battlefields....

~ One shared purpose..
Serving the nation with integrity....

~ दो सफ़ेद कोट नहीं... पर दोनों की ज़िम्मेदारी सफ़ेद है....।
एक धड़कनों का हिसाब रखता है...,
दूसरा हिसाबों की धड़कन बचाता है।
दोनों का कर्म अलग है...,
पर दोनों का धर्म सेवा है।

~ To every doctor who heals with compassion...,
~ and every Chartered Accountant who builds trust with integrity.....!

Happy Doctor's Day and Happy CA Day....!

Different missions....
One date...
Equal respect....
